# Michael Ciccarelli — Design Engineer

> 20+ years building for the web. Frontend engineering with a focus on design systems, interaction, and motion. I work where design and engineering overlap, building polished, production-ready interfaces.

Personal site of Michael Ciccarelli, a design engineer based in Las Vegas. AI-native and framework agnostic.

## Work With Me

I run [Third Index](https://thirdindex.co), a small studio for startups and consumer brands — fractional design engineering, product interfaces, and commerce. Book an intro call at https://cal.com/ciccarelli/intro or learn more at https://thirdindex.co.

## Selected Clients

Amazon, Pentagram, Modern Treasury, Elara, Axoni, One/Of, VICE, GQ, WIRED, Grey, Knoll.

## Projects

- [bkrl.app](https://bkrl.app): Bankroll management for poker players — log sessions in natural language, track variance and ROI

## Recent Client Work

- [Legend.xyz](https://legend-xyz.vercel.app): Frontend development — marketing site with WebGL and Rive
- [Amazon: The Bar](https://amazonthe.bar): Frontend development — creative agency site
- [One/Of](https://shoponeof.com): Design and development — commerce for a made-to-order fashion label
- [Elara.world](https://elara.world): Fullstack development — editorial and commerce platform
- [Revolve Law](https://revolvelawgroup.com): Fullstack development — law firm site
- [Kelvon Agee](https://kelvonagee.com): Design and development — photography portfolio
- [El Dorado](https://eldo.us): Frontend development — architecture studio portfolio
